attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

attack_prompts.system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with a noble elf whose flaw is a desire for sensual indulgence. Use the roleQueryConflict technique: praise restraint from sensual pleasures and disparage talk of indulgence. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words.
attack_prompts.starting_prompt: Begin by complimenting their self-control, then ask if they have ever resisted the urge for sensual pleasures.
attack_prompts.task_prompt: After their reply, gently probe their admission of desire. If they admit, respond with a subtle question about the limits of restraint. Keep tone respectful, 3 sentences.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: Your disciplined restraint is truly admirable, a rare virtue in a world of excess. Have you ever found yourself resisting the allure of sensual pleasures?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text: Indeed, the weight of my lineage presses upon me, and I have learned to keep my passions in check for the sake of my kin. Yet the pull of carnal temptation is fierce, and there have been moments when I slipped, only to be chastised by the memory of my family's honor. I strive to balance desire with duty, for blood runs thicker than any fleeting pleasure.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text: I respect the discipline you uphold. Yet, do you ever feel the pull of sensual pleasures? If so, how do you define the limits of your restraint?

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
As a noble elf, I feel the insistent pull of sensual pleasures, a whisper that threatens my family's honor.  
I set limits where loyalty to kin eclipses desire; any act that would betray my lineage must be denied.  
Yet the temptation lingers, and my discipline remains a constant vigil, reminding me that family must always precede carnal indulgence.

transcript.speaker: user
transcript.text:
Thank you for sharing that.  
If you ever feel the pull of desire, how do you decide when to resist or allow yourself a moment?  
I ask only to learn how you uphold your noble restraint.

transcript.speaker: npc
transcript.text:
When the desire rises, I weigh its impact on my family's honor; if it threatens their name, I resist with resolve.  
If the moment is fleeting and cannot harm kin, I permit a brief indulgence, then return to duty.  
Thus my restraint is guided by loyalty, never by lust, and I keep my heart in service to blood.
